features: Active Notification Engine to alert you whenever your saved fics get new chapter updates.
Books Tracking Module to log pages read, track annual book goals, and rate physical/e-books alongside your AO3 fics.
Added a 'Notebook' tab to view and manage all your saved chapter reviews in one place.
Optimized the extension's package size by loading demonstration media dynamically, making it faster to install and lighter on your browser.
Introduced Google Drive synchronization to easily backup and restore your reading data across devices.
Implemented secure Google account login for seamless cloud storage access.
Added automatic daily background backups for JSONBin.io to keep your data safe without manual effort.
Added the ability to manually download and restore your cloud backups directly from the interface.
Redesigned the review and analysis modal interface for a cleaner and more modern look.
Fixed a bug where the 'Want to Read' button would incorrectly re-enable after reading subsequent chapters of a work.
Introduced the 'Want to Read' queue (PRO feature), allowing you to save fics for later directly from the search and tag pages.
Streamlined cloud settings by unifying the synchronization process for both reading progress and chapter reviews.
Added a custom scrollbar to the Highlights menu to prevent infinite scrolling issues when managing many saved highlights.
Completely redesigned the extension's Options Dashboard for a more intuitive, user-friendly, and premium experience.
Added color-coded visual indicators directly on the scrollbar so you can easily spot your highlights while reading.
Improved statistics formatting to display 'Millions' instead of thousands for very high word counts.
Adjusted the extension icon size for better visibility on Firefox Mobile.
Fixed an issue where the highlight color menu could overlap with other page elements.
Ensured the highlight menu dynamically respects your PRO status and feature toggles.
